hero.name: Ángel Gabriel Delgado Pérez
hero.tagline: Developer with background in education and cybersecurity, building scalable web solutions with passion for clean code and user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.text: Full Stack Developer with experience in web and mobile application development. Passionate about building scalable solutions and continuous learning. My background in education and cybersecurity brings a unique perspective to developing secure and accessible software.
about.secondary: I strive to write clean, maintainable code focused on solutions that create real impact for users.

motivation.title: What I Can Offer
motivation.intro: My goal is to contribute to innovative projects where I can apply my technical and personal skills.
highlights: Backend development with Java, Spring Boot and Kotlin
Frontend with React, TypeScript and Astro
Database design with MySQL, PostgreSQL and REST APIs
Agile team work with Git and Docker
motivation.backend_desc: Robust REST APIs with Java, Spring Boot and Kotlin. Designing scalable architectures and maintaining high-availability systems.
motivation.frontend_desc: Reactive interfaces with React, TypeScript and Astro. Focus on accessibility, performance, and exceptional user experience.
motivation.database_desc: Schema design and optimization with MySQL and PostgreSQL. Efficient queries and data modeling for high-performance applications.
motivation.teaching_desc: Background in education brings a unique perspective. Ability to explain technical concepts clearly and mentor junior developers.
motivation.security_desc: Knowledge of secure development practices. Implementing authentication, data validation, and protection against vulnerabilities.
motivation.team_desc: Experience in agile teams, code reviews and Scrum methodologies. Effective communication with stakeholders and multidisciplinary work.

entries.title: DAM
entries.org: Higher Degree in Multiplatform App Dev

entries.title: ASIR

checklist_shop.name: CheckList Shop
checklist_shop.description: Local e-commerce Android application developed in Kotlin with SQLite and Room for data persistence. Implementation of the MVC pattern with product management, shopping cart and wishlist features.

stock_control.name: StockControl
stock_control.description: Inventory management system developed in React with Node.js backend. Frontend with Tailwind CSS and responsive design. Docker containers for deployment.
